meta.title: Gray's Resume
meta.description: This is Gray's personal resume website

home.self1: Hello! I'm Gray, a developer who is passionate about technology. I used to go by the name Gusty — I thought it sounded cool at the time, but later realized it was hard to pronounce and a bit awkward.
home.self2: I have four years of experience in full-stack web development, and I am also interested in Android and Windows application development, having built several small projects. In my free time, I enjoy games, anime, and movies, which often inspire new ideas. I used to go running on weekends, but these days I feel lazier about going outside and further away from a healthy lifestyle...
home.self3: If you are interested in my skills or experience, feel free to contact me. Thank you!
home.experience6: Worked as a Java Engineer in Taichung
home.experience7: Returned home and became a C# Engineer

skill.react: Self-studied for a while and have used it a bit at work
skill.java: Used to make a living with it, but haven't touched it for a long time
skill.python: Only used occasionally for small utility scripts
skill.csharp: My recent job mainly uses this, and it is currently my primary language
skill.typescript: I write a lot of JavaScript, but only have basic knowledge of TypeScript with little hands-on experience
skill.flutter: I believe mobile development has a future, so I self-studied it for a while and recently had the chance to use it at work
skill.japaneseDesc: I passed the JLPT N2, but have barely spoken Japanese in real situations

portfolio.order_drink: Built with React, a simple drink ordering web app
portfolio.gusty_little_world: Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — an early black history
portfolio.anime_list: Built with Flutter, an app to view seasonal anime lists
portfolio.cram_for_interview: Built with React Native, a simple interview question app
portfolio.pc_customizer: Built with Blazor Hybrid, crawls products from CoolPC and allows custom PC configurations
portfolio.gusty_dog: A LINE bot integrated with the Gemini API
